channel.title: Patchstack — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Patchstack (patchstack).

item.title: CVE-2026-52703 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress FastDup plugin <= 2.7.2 - Path Traversal vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Path Traversal in FastDup <= 2.7.2 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-52702 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress SEO Redirection plugin <= 9.17 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Cross Site Scripting (XSS) in SEO Redirection <= 9.17 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-52700 · 8.5 HIGH — WordPress WCMultiShipping plugin <= 3.0.2 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Subscriber SQL Injection in WCMultiShipping <= 3.0.2 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-52699 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress VikRentCar plugin <= 1.4.5 - Insecure Direct Object References (IDOR) vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Insecure Direct Object References (IDOR) in VikRentCar <= 1.4.5 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-52697 · 8.5 HIGH — WordPress Taskbuilder plugin <= 5.0.7 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Subscriber SQL Injection in Taskbuilder <= 5.0.7 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-52695 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress ABC Crypto Checkout plugin <= 1.8.2 - Sensitive Data Exposure vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Sensitive Data Exposure in ABC Crypto Checkout <= 1.8.2 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-52694 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Signature Add-On for WooCommerce plugin <= 2.0 - Sensitive Data Exposure vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Sensitive Data Exposure in Signature Add-On for WooCommerce <= 2.0 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-52693 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress eCommerce Product Catalog plugin <= 3.5.5 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated SQL Injection in eCommerce Product Catalog <= 3.5.5 versions.

item.description: Unauthenticated Sensitive Data Exposure in Affiliates Manager <= 2.9.50 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-49781 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress OttoKit plugin <= 1.1.27 - PHP Object Injection vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated PHP Object Injection in OttoKit <= 1.1.27 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-49780 · 8.8 HIGH — WordPress Dokan plugin <= 5.0.2 - Privilege Escalation vulnerability
item.description: Customer Privilege Escalation in Dokan <= 5.0.2 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-49776 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress GPTranslate – Multilingual AI Translation for WordPress: Automatically Translate Websites plugin <= 2.32.6 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated SQL Injection in GPTranslate – Multilingual AI Translation for WordPress: Automatically Translate Websites <= 2.32.6 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-49775 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WordPress Welcart e-Commerce plugin <= 2.11.28 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Broken Access Control in Welcart e-Commerce <= 2.11.28 versions.

item.description: Subscriber Cross Site Scripting (XSS) in FV Flowplayer Video Player < 7.5.51.7212 versions.
